text: The property is zoned B-1 (Neighborhood Business District), which supports its current use and contributes to its continued marketability. The effective date of value for this appraisal is as stated in the report. The interest appraised is the fee simple estate, as the property is owner-occupied and not encumbered by a long-term lease at the time of appraisal. This zoning and current improvements are consistent with surrounding commercial development, supporting the property’s highest and best use as an owner-occupied automotive service facility.
